2604.26619.title: Zero-Shot to Full-Resource: Cross-lingual Transfer Strategies for Aspect-Based Sentiment Analysis
2604.26619.paper_summary: Aspect-based Sentiment Analysis (ABSA) extracts fine-grained opinions toward specific aspects within text but remains largely English-focused despite major advances in transformer-based and instruction-tuned models. This work presents a multilingual evaluation of state-of-the-art ABSA approaches across seven languages (English, German, French, Dutch, Russian, Spanish, and Czech) and four subtasks (ACD, ACSA, TASD, ASQP). We systematically compare different transformer architectures under zero-resource, data-only, and full-resource settings, using cross-lingual transfer, code-switching and machine translation. Fine-tuned Large Language Models (LLMs) achieve the highest overall scores, particularly in complex generative tasks, while few-shot counterparts approach this performance in simpler setups, where smaller encoder models also remain competitive. Cross-lingual training on multiple non-target languages yields the strongest transfer for fine-tuned LLMs, while smaller encoder or seq-to-seq models benefit most from code-switching, highlighting architecture-specific strategies for multilingual ABSA. We further contribute two new German datasets, an adapted GERestaurant and the first German ASQP dataset (GERest), to encourage multilingual ABSA research beyond English.
2604.26619.paper_summary_zh: 基於面向的情感分析（ABSA）提取針對文本中特定方面的細緻意見，但儘管在基於Transformer和指令調整模型方面取得了重大進展，仍然主要集中於英語。這項工作針對七種語言（英語、德語、法語、荷蘭語、俄語、西班牙語和捷克語）和四個子任務（ACD、ACSA、TASD、ASQP）進行了最先進的 ABSA 方法的多語言評估。我們在零資源、僅數據和全資源設置下系統地比較了不同的Transformer架構，使用跨語言轉移、代碼切換和機器翻譯。經過微調的大型語言模型（LLMs）在整體得分上達到最高，特別是在複雜的生成任務中，而少樣本模型在較簡單的設置中接近這一表現，較小的編碼器模型也保持競爭力。在多個非目標語言上進行的跨語言訓練為經過微調的 LLMs 產生了最強的轉移，而較小的編碼器或序列到序列模型則最能從代碼切換中受益，突顯出特定架構的多語言 ABSA 策略。我們還貢獻了兩個新的德語數據集，一個是改編的 GERestaurant 和第一個德語 ASQP 數據集（GERest），以鼓勵超越英語的多語言 ABSA 研究。
2604.26619.author: Jakob Fehle et.al.
2604.26619.authors: Jakob Fehle, Nils Constantin Hellwig, Udo Kruschwitz, Christian Wolff
